title: Substack Direct Subscribe for WordPress
description: A WordPress plugin that brings direct Substack subscription collection to WP — with a shortcode, Gutenberg block, and timed popup modal.
content:
After shipping the vanilla React version, I ported the same approach to WordPress — a full plugin with a shortcode, a Gutenberg block with sidebar settings, a timed popup modal with admin configuration, and two layout variants (card and banner). All vanilla JavaScript, no build step, zero dependencies.

The plugin sends subscribe requests directly from the visitor's browser to Substack, bypassing cloud-IP blocks without touching your server. No email data is stored in WordPress — fully GDPR-friendly out of the box.

View on GitHub →
